# Gcore Colocation

> Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 15 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.

- [Colocation](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/overview.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 15 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.
- [Smart Hands](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/smart-hands.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation Smart Hands - paid on-site technical support service with standard and high-priority tiers for customer hardware.
